review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes RBAC controls related to account management. The naming convention is mostly followed, but one function name was adjusted for clarity to better indicate the check's purpose. The functions align with the NIST AC-2(1) control by focusing on automated management of roles and bindings, ensuring least privilege and avoiding excessive permissions.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names clearly indicate the specific check being performed, such as restricting role bindings.
title: Account Management - Account management | automated system account management support the management
step1_reasoning: The NIST AC-2(1) control focuses on automated account management, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to RBAC configurations ensuring least privilege, avoiding cluster-admin bindings, and managing service account tokens. These checks ensure that access is controlled and automated management of roles and bindings is enforced, similar to cloud IAM roles and policies.
